Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire

Class VarInt

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.wire.VarInt
public final class VarInt extends Object
Unsigned LEB128 variable-length integer codec used pervasively by the Zenoh 1.x wire protocol.

Encoding: the integer is split into 7-bit groups from LSB. Each byte carries 7 payload bits in its low 7 bits; the high bit is a continuation flag (1 = more bytes follow, 0 = last byte).

Values 0..127 encode as one byte, 128..16383 as two bytes, and so on up to a hard cap of 10 bytes for a 64-bit unsigned value.

This class is deliberately dependency-free and side-effect-free apart from writing to the caller-supplied stream. Threading is the caller's responsibility.

Invariants

  • Round trip: decode(encode(v)) == v for all non-negative long values.
  • Negative values throw IllegalArgumentException on encode.
  • A varint that would require more than 10 bytes on the wire (i.e. a malformed 11+ byte encoding) throws on decode.
  • An unterminated varint (stream EOF before the continuation bit clears) throws EOFException on decode.

    Decode an unsigned LEB128 varint starting at offset in src.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_BYTES

      public static final int MAX_BYTES
      Maximum encoded length in bytes for a 64-bit unsigned value.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • encode

      public static byte[] encode(long value)
      Encode value as an unsigned LEB128 varint and return the bytes. Convenience wrapper around encode(long, OutputStream).
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value < 0

    • encode

      public static int encode(long value, OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Encode value as an unsigned LEB128 varint directly to out. Returns the number of bytes written.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value < 0
      IOException - if out.write throws

    • sizeOf

      public static int sizeOf(long value)
      Number of bytes encode(long) would produce for value.

    • decode

      public static VarInt.Decoded decode(byte[] src, int offset)
      Decode an unsigned LEB128 varint starting at offset in src.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the encoding runs off the end of the array, exceeds MAX_BYTES, or would overflow 64 bits.

    • decode

      public static long decode(InputStream in) throws IOException
      Decode an unsigned LEB128 varint from in. Returns the decoded value.
      Throws:
      EOFException - if the stream ends before the last continuation bit clears
      IOException - on other stream errors
      IllegalArgumentException - on malformed encoding (11+ bytes)
